This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 123 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/123). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). 2026-03-25T01:29:46.8855921Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-03-25T01:29:46.8856309Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-25T01:29:46.8856585Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-25T01:29:46.8856963Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-25T01:29:46.8857544Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-25T01:29:46.8857734Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-25T01:29:46.8858007Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-03-25T01:29:46.8858115Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-03-25T01:29:46.8858311Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-03-25T01:29:46.8858387Z [36;1mfi[0m
